# scanvi

**Category:** `annotation` · **Maturity:** `beta` · **Implementation:** `external` · **Version:** `0.1.0`

Semi-supervised cell annotation using scVI-tools scANVI.

## When to use

- Assign cell / spot labels from expression (and optionally spatial context).
- Semi-supervised cell annotation using scVI-tools scANVI.
- Requires external backend(s): `scvi-tools`.

## When not to use

- Skip if optional extras / containers are not installed (fail-closed).

**Wraps:** `scvi.model.SCANVI`

**Modalities:** `expression`, `labels`

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `labels_key` | `str` | `cell_type_seed` | Partial labels in obs. |
| `unlabeled_category` | `str` | `Unknown` | Unlabelled category value. |
| `batch_key` | `str|None` | `None` | Optional batch column. |
| `layer` | `str|None` | `counts` | Raw-count layer; None uses X. |
| `n_latent` | `int` | `30` | Latent dimensions. |
| `n_layers` | `int` | `2` | Encoder/decoder layers. |
| `scvi_epochs` | `int` | `200` | Unsupervised pretraining epochs. |
| `scanvi_epochs` | `int` | `100` | Semi-supervised epochs. |
| `accelerator` | `str` | `auto` | Lightning accelerator. |
| `devices` | `str|int` | `auto` | Lightning devices selection. |
| `seed` | `int` | `0` | scvi-tools random seed. |
| `key_added` | `str` | `cell_type` | Predicted label column. |
| `confidence_key` | `str` | `scanvi_confidence` | Confidence column. |
| `probability_key` | `str` | `scanvi_probabilities` | obsm probability key. |
| `latent_key` | `str` | `X_scanvi` | obsm latent embedding key. |

## Assumptions

- Selected layer contains raw non-negative counts.
- obs[labels_key] contains labelled cells and the unlabeled category.
- Labelled and unlabelled observations share the same feature space.
